data.title: Bybit introduces global credit incentive to promote adoption of Bybit TradFi platform; 2nd largest exchange by volume.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on August 1, 2025, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally based on trading volume, announced a worldwide initiative to promote the adoption of its upgraded Bybit TradFi* platform. Formerly named Gold & FX, this improved service allows users to access a wide range of features...

data.title: Kayne Anderson Energy Infrastructure Fund declares $0.08/share distribution for August 2025, payable on August 29.
data.description: Houston-based Kayne Anderson Energy Infrastructure Fund, Inc. disclosed on August 1, 2025, that they will be issuing a monthly distribution of $0.08 per share for August 2025. The payment will be made to common stockholders on August 29, 2025, as outlined in the provided table.

data.title: FOXO Technologies Inc.'s Big South Fork Medical Center joins Covenant Health network to provide swing bed services in Tennessee.
data.description: FOXO Technologies Inc. (NYSE American: FOXO) disclosed that its rural hospital, Big South Fork Medical Center in Oneida, Tennessee, has finalized a Performance Network Agreement with Covenant Health to offer swing bed services. This agreement signifies Big South Fork's status as a designated critical access hospital. Covenant Health, a major hospital network in Knoxville and East Tennessee, serves numerous facilities across the region. The agreement is expected to enhance the medical services available to the residents of the area.

data.title: Butterfly Network reported Q2 2025 revenue of $23.4 million, up 9% YoY with highest quarterly gross margins.
data.description: BURLINGTON, Mass. & NEW YORK-- Butterfly Network has reported its second-quarter 2025 financial results, showcasing record-breaking performance. The company achieved its highest quarterly revenue and gross margins to date. In Q2, it recorded quarterly revenue of $23.4 million, reflecting a 9% year-over-year growth. The guidance section has been updated, indicating revenue expectations of $91 million to $95 million, translating to approximately 13% growth, as opposed to the previously mentioned $92 million to $96 million.

data.title: New trade school in Atlanta addresses workforce shortages, aims to empower communities through training and job placement. 2 million shortage predicted in skilled trades.
data.description: Atlanta's Workforce Career Centers has launched a new Atlanta campus aimed at addressing the city's pressing workforce needs. The trade school aims to empower underserved communities by providing training, certifications, and practical experience that align with high-demand careers. The U.S. Chamber of Commerce has highlighted a national worker shortage crisis, with the skilled trades sector projected to face a shortfall of 2 million workers. This initiative seeks to bridge this gap and equip individuals with the skills required to meet industry demands.

data.title: Curaleaf opens new dispensary in St. Augustine, Florida, increasing store count to 68 statewide and 154 nationwide.
data.description: Curaleaf Holdings, Inc., a prominent global supplier of consumer cannabis items, recently opened a new store in Northeast Florida. This expansion has increased the company's total store count to 68 in the state and 154 across the country. This development was announced on August 1, 2025, in Stamford, Conn. The company is listed on the TSX as CURA and on the OTCQX as CURLF.

data.title: Metaplanet aims to raise $3.7B for 210,000 Bitcoin acquisition by 2027 through stock offering.
data.description: As part of its treasury strategy, a Japanese investment firm is planning to acquire a total of 210,000 Bitcoin by the conclusion of 2027 through a stock offering.

data.title: Neptune Digital Assets Corp. joins OTCQX, trading on OTC Markets with ticker NPPTF, operating in digital asset ecosystem.
data.description: On July 30, 2025, OTC Markets Group Inc. revealed that Neptune Digital Assets Corp. (TSX-V: NDA; OTCQX: NPPTF), involved in digital asset ecosystem operations, is now eligible to trade on the prestigious OTCQX® Best Market. The company, which trades over 12,000 U.S. and international securities, upgraded from the OTCQB® Venture Market to the OTCQX.

data.title: UK MHRA guidance allows Artelo Biosciences to begin Phase 1 trial for ART12.11, a CBD:TMP cocrystal for anxiety/depression.
data.description: The Medicines and Healthcare products Regulatory Agency (MHRA) has suggested that ART12.11 could be considered for expedited advancement through the Innovative Licensing and Access Pathway (ILAP). This pathway may enable faster development and approval of the candidate.

data.title: IES Holdings (NASDAQ: IESC) reports its fiscal 2025 third quarter results for the quarter ended June 30, 2025.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, IES Holdings, Inc. disclosed its financial outcomes for the quarter concluding on June 30, 2025. Tradable as IESC on the NASDAQ, the company revealed its performance in Houston.

data.title: Andreessen Horowitz cautions on draft crypto rules, suggests removing "ancillary asset" concept to avoid loopholes in legislation.
data.description: Andreessen Horowitz has called on the US Senate Banking Committee to eliminate the concept of "ancillary assets" in proposed cryptocurrency legislation. The firm cautioned that this provision could create loopholes in the regulations.

data.title: Colgate-Palmolive reports 1% sales growth, $0.91 EPS in Q2 2025; $1,484M cash from ops in first half of 2025.
data.description: In New York, Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE: CL) reported a 1.0% increase in net sales and a 1.8% increase in organic sales, which included a 0.6% decline from lower private label pet sales. GAAP EPS saw a 2% rise to $0.91, while Base Business EPS increased by 1% to $0.92. The GAAP gross profit margin decreased by 50 basis points to 60.1%, with Base Business Gross profit margin also declining by 70 basis points to 60.1%. Net cash provided by operations for the first six months of 2025 amounted to $1,484 million. The Company's leadership...

data.title: Global industrial services market is shifting to comprehensive asset stewardship in response to advanced technologies and rising customer expectations. Report covers period of 2025-2029.
data.description: Dublin - A new report on the global industrial services market predicts significant changes in the industry between 2025 and 2029. The report, now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, discusses a transition from basic asset coverage to comprehensive asset stewardship. This shift is driven by evolving customer demands and the increasing presence of advanced technologies. Service models are adapting to include subscriptions, rentals, consumable options, uptime-focused contracts, and as-a-service solutions such as robotics-as-a-service. The market is poised for transformation as it responds to these trends, and stakeholders should be prepared for new opportunities and challenges ahead.

data.title: Minimal belief in Trump's attempt to remove Fed Chair Powell by August; just 6% chance per Polymarket. 12% out by 2025.
data.description: Forecasting markets indicate little confidence that Donald Trump will move to dismiss Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell by the end of August, despite Trump's recent criticism of Powell on Truth Social. Polymarket, a decentralized prediction platform, reports a mere 6% chance of Trump attempting to oust Powell before August 31. Additionally, another Polymarket contract monitoring the possibility of Powell no longer serving as Fed Chair by the conclusion of 2025 has dropped to 12%, down 11 percentage points from previous figures. These market predictions follow Trump's latest public outburst against Powell, triggered by the Federal Reserve's recent decision... For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.
